item.title: Age Verification Is Identity Capture
item.description: Age verification is the name on the label. The contents are different. What these systems capture is not a yes-or-no answer about whether a user meets an age threshold. They capture a name, a document number, the geometry of a face, and a timestamp linking all three to a specific platform session. That is identity verification. The age assertion is incidental. The distinction matters technically. Age is a boolean: over threshold or not.
